OpenClaw AI Update: Control Your REAL Chrome Browser (Full Tutorial)

OpenClaw just released a massive update allowing its AI agent to control your actual Chrome browser for tasks like checking Gmail and LinkedIn. Learn how to set up the new User Profile mode for free in under five minutes with zero technical experience required.
